name: fable-orchestrator
description: Model-aware multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: auto-detects the session model and injects a Fable (token-frugal) or Opus (latency-lean) profile, with a Requirements Ledger and guard hooks that enforce the discipline mechanically.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Model-aware multi-agent orchestration: a Fable token-frugal profile and an Opus latency-lean profile, auto-selected from the session model, plus a Requirements Ledger and guard hooks that enforce the discipline mechanically.
